name: Blood Moon
title: Blood Moon Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Blood Moon | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A Halloween highball that mixes white rum, blood orange sour, and ginger beer over ice.
marketing_description: A quenching Halloween treat that is eerily delicious and spookily satisfying.

steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice.
Garnish with a blood orange wheel or fangs.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Blood Moon Ingredients 30 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 30 ml Finest Call® Blood Orange Sour 89 ml ginger beer ... Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. Add all ingredients. Stir to combine. Garnish with a blood orange wheel or fangs.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Blood Moon Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
